title: ononis ramosissima var. arenaria
intro: Ononis ramosissima var. arenaria, also known as Burmed clover or Spreading Restharrow, is a perennial plant species belonging to the legume family. It has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects. The plant is rich in flavonoids, saponins, and phenolic acids, which are believed to provide various health benefits, such as reducing inflammation, improving cardiovascular health, and supporting the immune system. Ononis ramosissima var. arenaria can be prepared in various herbal forms, including infusions, decoctions, and tinctures, which are used to treat a range of health issues.
